name: healthcare_reconciliation_job_reorders_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare reconciliation job reorders stonehaven lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Darius Kim
agents.identity: I am Darius Kim, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Talia Kim
agents.identity: I am Talia Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Darius Kim must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Darius Kim do?
